rules.name: render-pass-change
rules.finding: Changed text references render pass or RenderGraph flow.
rules.next_step: Check resource declarations, pass ordering, debug names, and Tracy instrumentation for affected render paths.

rules.name: shader-binding-change
rules.finding: Changed text references shader compilation, reflection, or binding behavior.
rules.next_step: Verify shader compilation on Vulkan and DX12, and inspect shader debug dumps when failures appear.

rules.name: runtime-config-change
rules.next_step: Confirm the next run uses the intended backend, validation, VSync, and debug-view state.

rules.name: profiling-instrumentation
rules.next_step: Confirm profiling scopes are in .cpp files and use pass-level names with useful counts.

rules.name: error-flow-change
rules.next_step: Check that failure paths use the project process-error style where practical and keep cleanup centralized.

rules.name: documentation-change
rules.next_step: Review docs for consistency with the actual runtime and validation behavior.

rules.name: automation-tool-change
rules.finding: Changed text references developer automation or generated reports.
rules.next_step: Run the affected tool self-test and inspect generated reports before relying on the automation.
